calls.cond: for(param in params.values()) ∧ if(hasattr(BaseModel, param.name) and callable(getattr(BaseModel, param.name)))

calls.name: getattr

calls.name: InvalidSignature
calls.cond: if(sig.return_annotation is inspect.Parameter.empty and structured_output is True)

calls.name: InvalidSignature
calls.cond: if(output_model is None and structured_output is True)

calls.name: get_args
calls.cond: if(annotation is None) ∧ if(origin is dict)

calls.name: len
calls.cond: if(annotation is None) ∧ if(origin is dict) ∧ if(len(args) == 2 and args[0] is str)

calls.cond: if(annotation is None) ∧ if(origin is dict)

calls.name: _create_model_from_class
calls.cond: if(annotation is None) ∧ if(issubclass(annotation, BaseModel)) ∧ if(type_hints)

calls.name: ValueError
calls.cond: if(path is None and data is None)

calls.name: ValueError
calls.cond: if(path is not None and data is not None)

calls.name: get
calls.cond: for(param_name, param in sig.parameters.items()) ∧ if(param.kind == inspect.Parameter.POSITIONAL_ONLY)

calls.name: func
calls.cond: for(param_name, param in sig.parameters.items()) ∧ if(param.kind == inspect.Parameter.POSITIONAL_ONLY) ∧ if(param_type == request_type) ∧ if(param.default is not inspect.Parameter.empty)

calls.name: func
calls.cond: for(param_name, param in sig.parameters.items()) ∧ if(param.kind == inspect.Parameter.POSITIONAL_ONLY) ∧ if(param_type == request_type)

calls.name: get
calls.cond: for(param_name, param in sig.parameters.items()) ∧ if(param.kind in (inspect.Parameter.POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD, inspect.Parameter.KEYWORD_ONLY))

calls.name: func

calls.name: func
calls.cond: for(param_name, param in sig.parameters.items()) ∧ if(param.kind in (inspect.Parameter.POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD, inspect.Parameter.KEYWORD_ONLY)) ∧ if(param_type == request_type)

calls.cond: for(param_name, param in sig.parameters.items()) ∧ if(param.kind in (inspect.Parameter.POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD, inspect.Parameter.KEYWORD_ONLY)) ∧ if(param_type == request_type)

calls.name: debug

calls.name: _make_error_result
calls.cond: try ∧ if(validate_input and tool) ∧ try ∧ except

calls.name: _make_error_result
calls.cond: try ∧ if(tool and tool.outputSchema is not None) ∧ if(maybe_structured_content is None)

calls.name: validate
calls.cond: try ∧ if(tool and tool.outputSchema is not None) ∧ if(maybe_structured_content is None) ∧ try

calls.name: _make_error_result
calls.cond: try ∧ if(tool and tool.outputSchema is not None) ∧ if(maybe_structured_content is None) ∧ try ∧ except

calls.name: isinstance

calls.name: reset

calls.name: InvalidScopeError
calls.cond: for(scope in requested_scopes) ∧ if(scope not in allowed_scopes)

calls.name: InvalidRedirectUriError
calls.cond: if(redirect_uri is not None) ∧ if(redirect_uri not in self.redirect_uris)

calls.name: hasattr

calls.name: hasattr

calls.name: ValueError
